Clearwell Harbor Health Bancorp, Inc. (a US issuer listed on the Harbor Street Exchange) provides this US Privacy Notice and MNPI Handling Addendum.
We process personal information under a CCPA/HIPAA/GLBA patchwork, treating any information reasonably linkable to a consumer, household, or patient as personal data.
Special-category data may be processed only with explicit consent or statutory exception; see our Fair Disclosure Policy and HIPAA Notice of Privacy Practices for cross-references.
Mr. Dorian Hale (Employee No. CH-7425) enrolled in iris-scan door access and disclosed a Type 1 diabetes treatment plan to our on-site clinic for accommodation purposes.
Mr. Hale also requested a Friday prayer accommodation as part of the Faith & Fellowship employee resource group; such religious data is restricted to HR and the clinic.
Analyst and investor workflows prohibit selective disclosure of material non-public information; pre-release clinical or earnings content must be disseminated broadly under Regulation FD-compliant channels.
Employees in Investor Relations and the Treasury Desk must place drafts of earnings decks, drug safety updates, and bank credit metrics in the Aurora Vault until public posting; do not brief sell-side analysts at Orbital Peak Securities LLC or the Northpoint Wolves fan forum.
If a lapse occurs (e.g., a mistaken pre-release revenue email), we will issue simultaneous public notice and trading blackouts to mitigate Rule 10b-5 risk and will notify our Audit Committee.
Patient lending and HSA workflows combine HIPAA PHI and GLBA NPI; access is role-based and logged via badge and keystroke biometrics.
California residents and other US consumers may submit access, deletion, or correction requests by emailing privacy@clearwellharbor.example; verified responses exclude trade secrets and MNPI.
We transfer data to Pine Borough Cloud Services LLC (US) and to HarborLink Research Ltd. (UK/EEA) under appropriate contracts; any onward disclosure to underwriters or exchanges occurs only after public dissemination.
Retention: biometric templates are deleted within 3 years after last use; health accommodation records are retained 7 years; MNPI incident logs are retained 5 years or longer if litigation holds apply.
Keycard access to the dialysis suite is logged for safety and emergency response, not for performance scoring.
We support DEI initiatives and respectful dialogue across religion and politics; this Notice does not collect employees’ political opinions by default.
Our monthly market letter once compared business cycles to genetics and union strategy—a pure metaphor, not a data use case.
Questions may be directed to Ms. Tamsin Crowe, Privacy Program Manager, at dpo@clearwellharbor.example.
